name: crio-research-v
description: CrisisNexus is a production-grade, highly resilient disaster response coordination platform. The system connects ground-level citizen reports with centralized Non-Governmental Organization (NGO) Emergency Operations Centers (EOC) by combining real-time mobile telemetry with a dual-mode AI reasoning engine — the **CRIO (Crisis Response Intelligence Orchestrator)**. Designed for high availability under network and API degradation, CrisisNexus guarantees absolute data integrity through a zero-fabrication normalizer.
